docs.title: Hi 👋, I'm Vishwas Gowda
docs.text: I am a passionate AI/ML Engineer. I love working on ML and NLP problems, and I'm currently building LLM-based solutions in finance at Pipe Technologies

docs.title: Projects
docs.text:
Here are some of the projects I have worked on:

  • FinSight: Financial Insights At Your Fingertips

  • ML From Scratch: Core Machine Algos Implemented From Scratch

  • AI Email Campaign Generator
